The goat is green, green is her offspring, green is her shepherd, green is her herder. She eats green grass in a green corner, she drinks green water from a green canal. He threw a stick at her, she did not turn around; he threw a clod of earth at her, she did not raise her head; he threw a bunch of thyme and salt at her: the bile began to disappear like fog. bright things will become confused, clear things blurred, rain and flooding will be cut off
